posts.author: Goat******76
posts.content:
Predictions: 12 of 12 Pending
|
Tied for 1st with 1432 others

I’m gonna have to put my money on Edmen against Jun. Sure, if Jun gets Edmen to the mat, he’s gonna get pounded into the dirt face down ass up, but Edmen is a sniper on a good day and looked much reformed in being patient with his shots in his last bout, so I’m willing to finally give him the benefit of the doubt. Also, Jun’s head movement is pretty much non-existent, and he walks around the ring like he just got out of a vasectomy, so I can’t in good conscience put all the chips on him simply for his standup defense.

* Edited at 02.19.2026,  8:14 PM ET *
